items.title: Google to punish sites that trap people in with back button tricks
items.summary: The tech giant said it will punish sites that block back button navigation from June.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: Spotify launches the ability to purchase physical books in the US and UK
items.summary: Spotify users in the US and UK can officially purchase physical books through the Android app. iOS users will get the feature next week.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: The Deepfake Nudes Crisis in Schools Is Much Worse Than You Thought
items.summary: An analysis by WIRED and Indicator found nearly 90 schools and 600 students around the world impacted by AI-generated deepfake nude images—and the problem shows no signs of goin...
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.
